200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the fighter’s attacks ignore 20% of the target’s physical armor for 5 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the fighter’s attacks ignore 40% of the target’s physical armor for 5 sec. Also, the attacks deal an extra 15000 physical damage. The fighter takes 15% less magic damage throughout the battle. Once in a while when the unit is targeted by an ability, they deal their attack damage to the enemy that is using an ability against them.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the fighter’s attacks ignore 55% of the target’s physical armor for 5 sec. Also, the attacks deal an extra 25000 physical damage. The fighter takes 25% less magic damage throughout the battle. Once in a while when the unit is targeted by an ability, they deal their attack damage to the enemy that is using an ability against them. Once in a while, the unit drains 5000 damage per second from 3 random enemies and enhances own damage by that value for 5 sec. The effect lasts for 5 sec. All units that have their damage drained take damage equal to the unit’s attack damage every second. When the fighter is done draining damage, they shoot an additionnal arrow at a nearby enemy every second, dealing the fighter’s attack damage.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When Reaver’s attacks start piercing armor, the unit’s damage is increased by 25% for 5 sec.

description 4/6

When Reaver’s attacks start piercing armor, the unit’s damage is increased by 25% for 5 sec. Damage from an attack that targets the enemy that used an ability on Reaver ignores 100% armor.

description 6/6

When Reaver’s attacks start piercing armor, the unit’s damage is increased by 25% for 5 sec. Damage from an attack that targets the enemy that used an ability on Reaver ignores 100% armor. Reaver drains damage from 4 enemies.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When Reaver’s attacks start piercing armor, they gain a shield that blocks 5 attacks.

description 4/6

When Reaver’s attacks start piercing armor, they gain a shield that blocks 5 attacks. Once in a while, when Reaver becomes the target of an ability, they also gain a shield that absorbs 100000 damage of any type. The shield lasts for 3 sec.

description 6/6

When Reaver’s attacks start piercing armor, they gain a shield that blocks 5 attacks. Once in a while, when Reaver becomes the target of an ability, they also gain a shield that absorbs 100000 damage of any type. The shield lasts for 3 sec. While stealing damage, Reaver drains 3000 armor every second.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When Reaver attacks start piercing armor, the unit’s attacks also start reducing the target’s physical armor by 5% for 5 sec. Up to 5 effects.

description 4/6

When Reaver attacks start piercing armor, the unit’s attacks also start reducing the target’s physical armor by 5% for 5 sec. Up to 5 effects. Damage from an attack that targets the enemy that used an ability on Reaver reduces armor by 10% for 7 sec. Up to 3 effects.

description 6/6

When Reaver attacks start piercing armor, the unit’s attacks also start reducing the target’s physical armor by 5% for 5 sec. Up to 5 effects. Damage from an attack that targets the enemy that used an ability on Reaver reduces armor by 10% for 7 sec. Up to 3 effects. While draining out damage, Reaver restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt by the drain.

Materials

Primordial Energy
